_comment: TODO: apps/web and apps/library have no prior GitHub releases or tags (checked via gh api) — seeded at 0.1.0, confirm before the first release-please run. packages/gurmukhi (1.0.0) is carried over from gurmukhi-utils' to-rust branch's own .release-please-manifest.json: a fresh versioning lineage for the Rust rewrite, distinct from the old JS package's 3.2.2 release history. database (5.0.0-next.0) and apps/presenter (2.11.3) match each repo's latest tagged release.
